en: Why? Because I didn't think March 31st existed.
30 days has September, April, March, and November.
June and November. Today is March 31st.
I know. So then how many meetings do I have today?
Okay, okay. Well, you know what to do.
Right. To me, this situation is a blood-soaked, nightmarish hellscape.
ko: 나에게 이 상황은 피로 물든 악몽 같은 지옥이야.

en: However, to Leslie Knope... Oh, how fun!
Yay! Why don't you take as many as you can and I'll cover the rest.
ko: 가능한 한 많이 맡고 나머지는 내가 처리할게. 더 좋은 아이디어가 있어.

en: I have a better idea. Why don't I try to rustle up seven more meetings because I think it would be cooler if there were an even hundred.
Why don't we just stick to these 93 and see how it goes. Yeah, okay.
ko: 그냥 이 93개로 진행해보고 어떻게 되는지 보자. 응, 좋아.

en: So basically, we're completely swamped. All hands on deck.
I don't even work in this building. Don't care. I need anyone with a pulse and a brain to pitch in.
ko: 나는 이 건물에서 일하지도 않아. 상관 없어.
